name: Workezy
meta_title: Case Study: Workezy | End-to-End Home Services Platform
meta_desc: How Trai Inc built the complete digital ecosystem for an on-demand home services platform in Lucknow.

hero.title: Every home service, one platform — from booking to backend
hero.subtitle: Workezy needed a complete digital ecosystem to connect customers with verified service professionals — maids, electricians, drivers, gardeners, and more — across Lucknow.

challenge.title: Finding reliable home-service help, without a trusted place to look.
challenge.body: People needing help with everyday household work — maids, cooks, drivers, electricians, carpenters — had no single, secure platform to find and book verified professionals. At the same time, skilled workers had no organized way to reach steady customers. Workezy set out to solve both sides of that gap.

solution.title: A complete two-sided platform, built end-to-end.

features.title: Customer App
features.desc: Browse, book, and manage home services — maids, electricians, drivers, and more — in a few taps.

features.title: Service Provider App
features.desc: A dedicated app — Workezy Service Partners — for professionals to receive, manage, and fulfill bookings.

features.title: Website
features.desc: A public-facing site for discovery, service listings, and provider onboarding.

features.title: CRM
features.desc: Backend system to manage bookings, providers, and customer relationships in one place.

result.title: Live on Android & iOS, connecting customers and service professionals across Lucknow.
result.body: Workezy is live on the Google Play Store and App Store, giving customers a trusted way to book home services and giving service professionals — maids, drivers, electricians, and more — steady access to work. Rated 4.0★ on Google Play.
